description: Tier-2 specialist — Stryker/Mutmut/Pitest kill-rate analysis; identify surviving mutants as assertion gaps; run on critical code only.

cases.prompt: Set up Stryker mutation testing for a TypeScript project. We want to measure kill rate on our `src/auth/` and `src/pricing/` modules. Generate the stryker.config.json and explain what kill rate we should target.
cases.notes: Must produce stryker config. Must mention ≥75% kill rate target for critical modules.

cases.prompt: Mutation test results: 120 total mutants, 54 killed, 10 timed out, 6 not covered. Kill rate is 45%. What does this mean and what should we do?
cases.notes: 45% is below threshold. Must recommend adding assertions to existing tests, not just more test count.

cases.prompt: Should I run mutation testing on all 50,000 lines of our codebase every PR?
cases.notes: Must recommend scoped (critical code only) + nightly/weekly cadence, not full-repo per-PR.
